任务是帮助历史英魂逆天改命，首个客户竟是诸葛亮！
【请为英魂‘诸葛亮’提供金手指二选一：】
【A. 实时地形沙盘（全图透视，敌军动向实时更新！）】
【B. 蜀汉英雄召还（复活刘备、关羽、张飞等所有已故英灵！）】
“丞相，选A啊！开全图挂，三天平推到许昌！”
诸葛亮轻摇羽扇：“亮，选B。”
【选择已确认，‘蜀汉英雄召还’已激活！】
【任务奖励：宿主可重返人间，并增强‘腰部’能力300%！】
张小凡：“！！！”
为了如家808，不对，是为了丞相的宏愿，我拼了！
丞相，街亭危急，快摇人！先召谁？
“云长，千军万马，待你归来！”
这一次，当拥有后世记忆的“事后诸葛亮”，手握蜀汉全明星的王炸阵容。
能否逆天改命，弥补遗憾，让大汉的旗帜，插满天下？
（后续会写岳飞、朱棣、扶苏等人，大家有想看其他人的，可以在评论里说，小弟尽可能满足。）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o35aaa49cebc9c5fbdfa0eb68f737acbd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"a灯火阑珊处","author_id":"","book_id":"7576865243662404633","book_name":"让你弥补遗憾，你复活蜀汉全明星","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#582010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8172人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7576865300218397209","read_count":"8172","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"530015"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"248","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,无女主,三国,重生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b2344582bbb8648c83486bf44d715b1a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499607&x-signature=pF3Ht19y4xlarNFLTva8FjvbYHw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2903188584804046","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"20"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324092647815C536B1E826F6965D8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读49分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2922,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":5
